source.cookbook: The Vegan Korean   Complete Guide And Cookbook so
source.author: Various

ingredients.item:
Pompeian Avocado Oil Non-Stick Cooking Spray
	1 yellow onion, diced
	2 medium carrots, diced (about 1 cup)
	3 cloves garlic
	1 cup shelled edamame, thawed if from frozen
	1 cup green peas
	1 cup kimchi (chop large chunks)
	2 tbsps kimchi juice (from the jar of kimchi)
	2 cups cooked brown rice
	1/4 cup soy sauce*
	1/4 cup green onions, sliced
ingredients.original:
Pompeian Avocado Oil Non-Stick Cooking Spray
	1 yellow onion, diced
	2 medium carrots, diced (about 1 cup)
	3 cloves garlic
	1 cup shelled edamame, thawed if from frozen
	1 cup green peas
	1 cup kimchi (chop large chunks)
	2 tbsps kimchi juice (from the jar of kimchi)
	2 cups cooked brown rice
	1/4 cup soy sauce*
	1/4 cup green onions, sliced

ingredients.item:
1 14-ounce package extra-firm tofu, drained and pressed**
	1 tsp ground turmeric
	1/2 tsp kala namak (black salt)
	1/4 tsp black pepper
ingredients.original:

	1 tsp ground turmeric
	1/2 tsp kala namak (black salt)
	1/4 tsp black pepper
